'''wanoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceasement|ceasement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceasement|ceasement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wanoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæneseth|wæneseth]] || [[word:wænesej|wænesej]] || [[word:wænesesh|wænesesh]] || [[word:wænese|wænese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanonosoth|wanonosoth]] || [[word:wanonosoj|wanonosoj]] || [[word:wanonososh|wanonososh]] || [[word:wanonoso|wanonoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanosoth|wanosoth]] || [[word:wanosoj|wanosoj]] || [[word:wanososh|wanososh]] || [[word:wanoso|wanoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanofsoth|wanofsoth]] || [[word:wanofsoj|wanofsoj]] || [[word:wanofsosh|wanofsosh]] || [[word:wanofsof|wanofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wanosotho|wanosotho]] || [[word:wanosojo|wanosojo]] || [[word:wanososho|wanososho]] || [[word:wanosoko|wanosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wanosoth|wanosoth]] || [[word:wanosoj|wanosoj]] || [[word:wanososh|wanososh]] || [[word:wanoso|wanoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wanosothol|wanosothol]] || [[word:wanosojol|wanosojol]] || [[word:wanososhol|wanososhol]] || [[word:wanosokol|wanosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wanosothotho|wanosothotho]] || [[word:wanosojojo|wanosojojo]] || [[word:wanososhosho|wanososhosho]] || [[word:wanosoko|wanosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wanosothon|wanosothon]] || [[word:wanosojon|wanosojon]] || [[word:wanososhon|wanososhon]] || [[word:wanosokon|wanosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wanosothoro|wanosothoro]] || [[word:wanosojoro|wanosojoro]] || [[word:wanososhoro|wanososhoro]] || [[word:wanosokoro|wanosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
